title: Press Kit Layout & Content Order Overhaul

requirements.text: On the Press Kit page, display the game logo at the same width as the content container, preserving its original aspect ratio. The logo must remain fully responsive across all screen sizes.

quotes: Game logo keep same aspect ratio but same width as content. Keep responsive in mind.

acceptanceCriteria: Game logo width matches the content container width on all screen sizes
Game logo aspect ratio is not distorted
Logo scales down correctly on mobile viewports

requirements.text: Apply the same custom background image used on the Landing page to the Press Kit page. The background should render identically (same positioning, sizing, and overlay behavior) as on the landing page.

quotes: Now the custom background that works in the first page is not there add the same background image to the presskit page.

acceptanceCriteria: Press Kit page displays the same custom background image as the Landing page
Background image positioning and sizing matches the Landing page
Background is visible behind all Press Kit content

requirements.text: Restructure the Press Kit page content to display sections in the following strict order: (1) Game Logo, (2) YouTube Video, (3) About, (4) Game Details, (5) Features, (6) Screenshots, (7) Download All Screenshots button, (8) Socials, (9) Press Email. Do not remove any existing content or functionality.

quotes: Display content in press kit: 1. Game logo 2. Youtube video 3. About 4. Game Details 5. Features 6. Screenshots 7. Download all screenshots 8. Socials 9. Press email

acceptanceCriteria: Game Logo appears first in the Press Kit page
Download All Screenshots button appears immediately after the screenshots gallery
No existing content or functionality is removed

constraints: Do not modify the Landing page in any way
Do not change any admin login, authentication, or password protection logic
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths)
nonGoals: Changes to the Landing page design or layout
Adding new backend fields or data models
Changing authentication or password gate behavior
